function.name: gmgn_trending
function.description: Get trending tokens ranked by volume/momentum on a chain. Use this in Hunter as the PRIMARY candidate source for fresh memecoin trades. Returns top N tokens with price/volume/liquidity/holders/smart-money/KOL counts + security flags. Granularity 1m to 24h.

function.name: gmgn_token_info
function.description: Real-time token fundamentals: price, volume, market cap, holders count, dev/KOL/smart-money counts, launchpad, social links, bonding-curve status.

function.name: gmgn_token_security
function.description: Token security check — honeypot, blacklist, mint/freeze authority, renounced, wash trading, rug ratio. Call this BEFORE any swap_token or deploy decision. Returns boolean flags + a 0-1 rug_score.

function.name: gmgn_token_holders
function.description: Top holders with categorization: smart-money / KOL / insider / bundler / sniper / fresh-wallet / whale. Used to assess concentration + bagholder risk.

function.name: gmgn_token_traders
function.description: Top traders on this token in the current window — by P&L. Surfaces who's making money and how recently.

function.name: gmgn_smart_money_trades
function.description: Recent smart-money (high P&L wallets) buys/sells on this token. If smart money is buying, that's a positive signal; if selling, treat as warning.

function.name: gmgn_kol_trades
function.description: Recent KOL (key opinion leader / influencer) buys/sells on this token.
